RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/mssql/crsp_read_dbtablename_cc.tsql
RuleSet.GenFile:
-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ use $lower DbSchemaName$ go
create proc $sp_read_dbtablename_cc$$implMSSqlSPStandardArgs$$reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each sparg_CommaTableCol )$ as$switch SecScope None empty System empty Cluster implMSSqlSPTableReallyDeclPermFlag Tenant implMSSqlSPTableReallyDeclPermFlag default error$ begin$poptop Table switch TableName Cluster empty Tenant empty SecUser empty default implMSSqlSPReadEnforceSec$ select distinct( $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.classcode ) as classcode from $lower DbSchemaName$..$DbTableName$ as $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implMSSqlClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implMSSqlIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implMSSqlIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$ order by classcode asc end go
quit
